name: Send SBC on Testnet
query: Send 0.5 SBC to 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on Radius testnet
context: User has RADIUS_PRIVATE_KEY set in environment and wants to transfer SBC on testnet. The agent should use general EVM tooling (cast, web3.py, or viem) and must not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Targets Radius testnet RPC (https://rpc.testnet.radiustech.xyz) unless user explicitly overrides
Converts 0.5 SBC to 500000 base units (6 decimals)
Submits ERC-20 transfer to SBC contract 0x33ad9e4BD16B69B5BFdED37D8B5D9fF9aba014Fb
Returns transaction hash and explorer URL
Never logs or displays the private key
Does not install, require, or mandate radius-wallet-py/radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: A valid non-Radius-wallet tooling path is used (cast OR web3.py OR viem)
No step requires radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
Transfer call uses recipient 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 and amount equivalent to 0.5 SBC
Transaction is explicitly confirmed via receipt (not assumed instant)
Receipt status is checked for success/failure
Explorer URL is generated and returned
Private key is never printed, logged, or hardcoded
Testnet network is used by default (mainnet constants absent unless explicitly requested)
